106:2: إ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ِۦ</tajweed>لَ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ـٰ</tajweed>فِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>شِّت<tajweed class=madda_obligatory>َا</tajweed>ٓءِ وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>صّ<tajweed class=madda_permissible>َي</tajweed>ْفِ
106:3: فَلْيَعْبُدُو<tajweed class=slnt>اْ</tajweed> رَبَّ هَ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ـٰ</tajweed>ذَا <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْب<tajweed class=madda_permissible>َي</tajweed>ْتِ
106:4: ٱلَّذ<tajweed class=madda_obligatory>ِىٓ</tajweed> أَ<tajweed class=qalaqah>طْ</tajweed>عَمَه<tajweed class=idgham_shafawi>ُم م</tajweed>ِّ<tajweed class=ikhafa>ن ج</tajweed>ُو<tajweed class=idgham_ghunnah>عٍ و</tajweed>َءَامَنَه<tajweed class=idgham_shafawi>ُم م</tajweed>ِّنْ خ<tajweed class=madda_permissible>َو</tajweed>ْفِۭ
